allow: Bash(awk -F',' '{ts+=$2; rw+=$3; n++} END {print "mean_time="ts/n" mean_reward="rw/n" n="n}')

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 && $2<300 {ts+=$2; rw+=$3; if\($2>max_t\) max_t=$2; n++} END {print "n="n" mean_time="ts/n" mean_reward="rw/n" max_time="max_t}' "C:/Users/Jacobo/Desktop/IA-UDC/4/TFG/metrics/nave_metrics_FINAL_2.csv")

Bash(awk -F',' 'BEGIN{n=0} {n++; data[n]=$0} END{q=int\(n/5\); for\(i=1;i<=5;i++\){ts=0;rw=0;c=0;start=\(i-1\)*q+1; end=i*q; if\(i==5\)end=n; for\(j=start;j<=end;j++\){split\(data[j],f,","\); ts+=f[2]; rw+=f[3]; c++}; print "Q"i" eps "start"-"end" mean_time="ts/c" mean_reward="rw/c}}')

Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 {if\($5>max2\)max2=$5; if\($5<min2 || NR==2\)min2=$5; if\($6>max3\)max3=$6; if\($6<min3 || NR==2\)min3=$6; if\($7>maxfc\)maxfc=$7; if\($7<minfc || NR==2\)minfc=$7} END {printf "lat_scale_2  : [%.4f, %.4f]\\nlat_scale_3  : [%.4f, %.4f]\\nlat_scale_fc : [%.4f, %.4f]\\n", min2,max2,min3,max3,minfc,maxfc}' "C:/Users/Jacobo/Desktop/IA-UDC/4/TFG/cubo2_progressive_metrics.csv")
